controls.smoothingDesc: Algorithm used to smooth frequency magnitude changes over time

smoothingOptions.gravity: Gravity (Attack/Decay) - Natural exponential response, fast attack for sudden sounds, gradual decay
smoothingOptions.lerp: Linear Interpolation (LERP) - Smooth transition between values at constant rate
smoothingOptions.none: None - Raw data without smoothing, shows exact instantaneous values

controls.attackDesc: How quickly magnitudes rise toward new higher values. Higher = faster response to sudden loud sounds.
controls.decayDesc: How quickly magnitudes fall toward lower values after the sound stops. Higher = faster fade out.
controls.weightingDesc: Simulates human ear sensitivity across frequency spectrum

weightingOptions.a: A-Weighting - Follows human ear frequency response curve, emphasizes mid frequencies (2-5kHz)
weightingOptions.c: C-Weighting - Flatter response, good for high volume measurements
weightingOptions.linear: Linear - No weighting, shows actual measured values

effects.title: Visual Effects
effects.glowTooltip: Add glow effect to high-energy bars (above -20dB). Makes loud sounds appear brighter.
effects.reflectionTooltip: Show mirrored reflection below each bar. Adds visual depth and perceived intensity.
effects.peakTooltip: Hold peak values for 1.5s before decaying. Helps identify maximum levels.
effects.pulseTooltip: Background subtly pulses with low-frequency energy. Creates immersive rhythm effect.
effects.centerLineTooltip: Draw smooth curve connecting bar midpoints. Shows overall spectral shape.

preset.title: Effect Presets
preset.bassic: Bassic - Enhanced effects for electronic music
preset.vivid: Vivid - Maximum visual effects for demonstration
preset.minimal: Minimal - Minimal effects for low-power devices

stats.frameDesc: Current frame counter from the audio analyzer
stats.peakDesc: Maximum magnitude across all frequency bins. Normal range: -60dB to 0dB
stats.avgDesc: Average magnitude across all frequencies. Indicates overall loudness

help.title: Help & Information
help.gettingStartedText:
1. Ensure the AudioFlow backend server is running
2. Grant microphone/system audio access when prompted
3. Select your preferred language and effect preset
4. Adjust smoothing and weighting to match your audio source
help.aboutText: AudioFlow is a real-time audio spectrum analyzer and visualizer. It captures system audio, performs FFT analysis, and renders beautiful visualizations with customizable effects.

error.connect: Unable to connect to AudioFlow server. Please ensure the backend is running on port 5000.
error.noAudio: No audio input detected. Please check your microphone or system audio settings.
error.serverError: Server error occurred. Check console for details.

frequency.title: Frequency Labels
frequency.low: Low (20-200Hz) - Bass, kick drums, bass guitars
